2605.07807.title: Text-to-CAD Evaluation with CADTests
2605.07807.paper_summary: Text-to-CAD has recently emerged as an important task with the potential to substantially accelerate design workflows. Despite its significance, there has been surprisingly little work on Text-to-CAD evaluation, and assessing CAD model generation performance remains a considerable challenge. In this work, we introduce a new evaluation perspective for Text-to-CAD based on automated testing. We propose CADTestBench, the first test-based benchmark for Text-to-CAD, based on CADTests, executable software tests that verify whether a generated CAD model satisfies the geometric and topological requirements of the input prompt. Using CADTestBench, we conduct comprehensive benchmarking of recent Text-to-CAD methods and further demonstrate that CADTests can also guide CAD model generation, yielding simple baselines that surpass performance of current methods. CADTestBench code and data are available at GitHub and Hugging Face dataset.
2605.07807.paper_summary_zh: Text-to-CAD 最近已成為一個重要任務，具有顯著加速設計工作流程的潛力。儘管其重要性，對於 Text-to-CAD 評估的研究卻意外地少，評估 CAD 模型生成性能仍然是一個相當大的挑戰。在本研究中，我們提出了一種基於自動化測試的 Text-to-CAD 新評估視角。我們提出了 CADTestBench，這是首個基於測試的 Text-to-CAD 基準，基於 CADTests，這是可執行的軟體測試，用於驗證生成的 CAD 模型是否滿足輸入提示的幾何和拓撲要求。使用 CADTestBench，我們對近期的 Text-to-CAD 方法進行了全面的基準測試，並進一步證明 CADTests 也可以指導 CAD 模型生成，產生的簡單基準超越了當前方法的性能。CADTestBench 的程式碼和數據可在 GitHub 和 Hugging Face 數據集上獲得。
2605.07807.author: Dimitrios Mallis et.al.
2605.07807.authors: Dimitrios Mallis, Marco Wang, Ahmet Serdar Karadeniz, Elisa Ricci, Anis Kacem, Djamila Aouada
